evals.prompt: Pomoz mi vytvorit novy skill pro backend security review vcetne trigger description a eval promptu.
evals.expected_output: Skill creation workflow s dotazy na scope, draftem SKILL.md a eval scaffoldem.
expectations: Output nepreskakuje discovery a trigger design.
Output premysli o iteraci a benchmarkingu, ne jen o prvnim draftu.

evals.prompt: Zhodnot existujici skill, navrhni jak zlepsit trigger accuracy a jak ho benchmarkovat proti predchozi verzi.
evals.expected_output: Proces pro improvement loop, benchmark, assertions a review viewer.
expectations: Output zahrnuje baseline vs improved comparison logiku.
Output resi assertions nebo expectations schema.
Output zohledni qualitative i quantitative evaluation.
